features: Educational Toys for Kids: The LCD writing tablet adopts 8.5-inch LCD colorful screen, provide children with enough space for drawing and graffiti, free child’s imagination and stimulate children's creativity! The LCD screen has no blue light, no glare, no radiation, and protects the eyes from long-term use to cause damage to children's eyes! It is a good partner for children to learn!

Environmental and Economical: The built-in battery of the drawing pad has 6 months lifespan, provides 100,000 times writing and drawing on the writing tablet, can be replaced and for cycle use, without charging or plugging in power. Say goodbye to traditional painting on paper, avoid waste of paper and pencils, avoid children scribbling on the walls at home, no more mess at home!

Easy to Use: The drawing tablet uses pressure-sensitive technology, and creates colorful lines of different thickness, based on how hard you push with stylus, nails, or any hard thing, just like writing and drawing on paper. Press erase button to clear the screen with one key, just a second, convenient and time-saving! Click the lock key to lock, which can effectively prevent accidental clearing, and you can erase the pattern after unlocking.

Lightweight and Portable: The case of drawing board for kids is made of durable plastic, weighs only 150 grams, lightweight and easy to carry, easy to place in school bags, handbags, travel bags. Suitable for multiple occasions: living room, car, plane, restaurant, outdoor places. The writing tablet is waterproof and anti-fall, no need to worry about accidental dropping and liquid pouring on the screen.

Best Toys Gifts for Kids: The LCD writing tablet can be used as a doodle board, doodle pad, kid’s drawing pad, writing board, toddler drawing board, drawing tablet, graphic aids, graphic tablet, magic children's board, light drawing board for kids and so on. It is a perfect gift choice for kids of all age groups ​for back to school, birthday, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas and Children's day! It can be an educational toy for preschoolers. It can be a travel toy for long drives and road trips.
description: Product Description Genialba 8.5 inch LCD Writing Tablet Colorful Screen Drawing Board Say goodbye to traditional painting methods, saving paper = saving money! LCD display drawing tablet, very clear writing, offers enough space for drawing and graffiti! Develop children's hands-on skills and help develop the right brain. Discover the creativity and imagination of children! It is a good partner for kids! The LCD screen offers a better view. No blue light, no glare, no harm to children's eyes. Early learning and education are good for children to write, draw, do arithmetic, spells and so on. Inspire children's inspiration. Fun and educational. DRAWING ANYTIME AND ANYWHERE The small size is lightweight and portable. With this drawing tablet you can paint, write anytime, anywhere. High quality ABS material makes the design thick and durable. It is the best choice for travel and car, easy to hold for kids to take on travel! Great travel toys to keep kids focused anywhere. Get rid of boredom even on a long car trip, road trip, plane, beach, trip out of town. One-Click Clear Drawing Board can be repeated at least 100,000 times. Just click the Clear button, the image disappears without a trace. Convenient and fast, reducing paper waste! Lock Key Added Smart Lock function. Click the lock key to lock, so as to prevent accidental deletion effectively and clear the pattern after unlocking. Replaceable Battery Built-in button battery (CR2025), has a 6-month lifespan, extremely low power consumption, can be replaced and for cycling use, without charging or connecting the power. Toddler Learning Educational Toys Gifts for 2 3 4 5 6 7 Years Old Girls and Boys Do you have a difficult time choosing a unique birthday gift for your children? Look out this LCD writing tablet! A creative gift for children and teens. The colorful drawing tablet allows your kids to draw, paint and scribble, just like natural pen on paper, great fun with a erase button to start a new clean face. The Drawing Board freely draws everything your kids think and helps cultivate children's learning and innovation skills.
